title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Reverie Delegates, Imu, Unknown person #6, Five Elders as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're the reason you're called the hero of the Marines, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, "Locks," eh? Hina, you're well-informed for someone as young as you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Anyone remember

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes. Before Roger, the age was theirs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that was more than 40 years ago, now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The past has passed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they've lost their captain, they've only become stronger. I'm worried.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no point worrying! If they return, they'll be a huge threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This situation, though, will get far bigger than any of us are imagining right now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why does that thought make you smile like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Holy Land Mariejois Pangaea Castle

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: King Stelly, of the Goa Kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: the oath.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Can I sit on it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even as a joke, such a thing would be unthink- able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: None must sit on that throne.

dialogue.speaker: Imu
dialogue.text: It is the empty throne!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that none must harbor the greed to rule them all, the greed of dictatorship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The twenty weapons that protect the throne

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Represent the oath that, 800 years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the architects of this world, the "first twenty," took.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They placed this place at the center of the world,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with the fact that it cannot be sat upon as a symbol of peace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as the highest authorities of the world, who sit atop even the celestial dragons,

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: are five, "The five elders"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So too shall this world not have but one king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now the, the oath,

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: King Stelly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If I sat there,

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: I'd be King of the World!

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: King Stelly?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wanna sit theeeeeere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pangael Castle Mingling Plaza

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Muffufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please stop, Saint Charles!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YES! Put Handcuffs on it and capture it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop! What are you planning on doing, Princess of Alabasta?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshi!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Stop, Rebecca! That's a celestial dragon!

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
